parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const baseUrl = String($env.OPENAI_API_URL || 'https://api.openai.com/v1').replace(/\/$/, ''); const model = $env.OPENAI_EMBEDDING_MODEL || 'text-embedding-3-small'; return baseUrl.endsWith('/v1') ? { model, input: $json.content } : { model, prompt: $json.content }; })() }}

={{ { points: [{ id: $json.pointId, vector: $json.vector, payload: { documentId: $json.documentId, uploadId: $json.uploadId, documentName: $json.fileName, fileName: $json.fileName, mimeType: $json.mimeType, requestId: $json.requestId, ingestionRunId: $json.ingestionRunId, chunkIndex: $json.chunkIndex, content: $json.content, tokenCount: $json.tokenCount } }] } }}
={{ { filter: { must: [{ key: 'documentId', match: { value: $json.documentId } }], must_not: [{ key: 'ingestionRunId', match: { value: $json.ingestionRunId } }] } } }}
